description: A flaw was found in a change made to path normalization in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49. An attacker could use a path traversal attack to map URLs to files outside the expected document root.
vsftpd 2.3.4 contains a backdoor in the source archive that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a :) smiley in the username.
Spring4Shell: A Spring Framework vulnerability allowing remote code execution via specialized parameters.
